description: A vertical graphic. The right side is a photograph of a woman wearing a telephone headset, resting her chin on her hand with a concerned expression. A blue panel on the left carries white text reading If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to HELP. A white band across the bottom shows a phone number 1-855-48-VOICE and ICE.GOV/VOICE, with the VOICE logo and the words VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT.
notable_text: If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to HELP; 1-855-48-VOICE; ICE.GOV/VOICE; VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT
